narrative:
Latty Township has 584 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
